app.name: Homegrown Academy
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to your Homegrown Academy account
auth.login.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.
auth.register.title: Start your homeschool journey
auth.register.subtitle: Create a free Homegrown Academy account
auth.register.name: Full name
auth.recovery.title: Reset your password
auth.recovery.subtitle: We'll send a recovery link to your email
auth.recovery.success: Check your email for a recovery link
auth.verification.title: Verify your email
auth.verification.subtitle: Enter the code sent to {email}
auth.sessionExpiring: Your session is about to expire
auth.sessionExpiring.description: You'll be logged out in {minutes} minutes.
auth.acceptInvitation.title: You've been invited
auth.acceptInvitation.subtitle: {inviterName} has invited you to co-manage their family on Homegrown Academy
auth.acceptInvitation.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired
coppa.title: Parental Consent
coppa.subtitle: Before adding students, we need your parental consent
coppa.description: Homegrown Academy collects limited information about students (display name, birth year, grade level) to personalize learning recommendations. We never sell this data or share it with third parties. You can delete student profiles at any time.
coppa.acknowledge: I understand and consent to data collection for my children's accounts
onboarding.title: Welcome to Homegrown Academy
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your family profile
onboarding.steps.nav.label: Onboarding steps
onboarding.familyProfile.title: Tell us about your family
onboarding.familyProfile.subtitle: This helps us personalize your experience and surface the right homeschooling requirements for your state.
onboarding.familyProfile.state.hint: Used to show relevant homeschooling laws and compliance requirements.
onboarding.familyProfile.region.hint: Helps connect you with nearby families. Optional.
onboarding.children.title: Add your learners
onboarding.children.subtitle: Add student profiles for each child you homeschool. You can always add more later. This step is optional.
onboarding.children.list.label: Added learners
onboarding.children.add.title: Add a learner
onboarding.children.name: Display name
onboarding.children.remove.label: Remove {name}
onboarding.methodology.title: Choose your homeschooling approach
onboarding.methodology.subtitle: How would you like to find the right methodology for your family?
onboarding.methodology.path.quiz.title: Import quiz results
onboarding.methodology.path.quiz.desc: Already took our methodology quiz on the public site? Paste your share link to import your results.
onboarding.methodology.path.explore.desc: Explore Charlotte Mason, Classical, Waldorf, Montessori, and more — then choose what resonates.
onboarding.methodology.quiz.title: Import your quiz results
onboarding.methodology.quiz.subtitle: Paste your quiz share link or ID below to import your personalized recommendations.
onboarding.methodology.quiz.takeFirst: Haven't taken the quiz yet? {link} on our public site first.
onboarding.methodology.quiz.shareId.hint: Found in your quiz results page — looks like 'abc123' or a full URL.
onboarding.methodology.quiz.error: We couldn't find that quiz result. Please check your share ID and try again.
onboarding.methodology.explore.title: Browse approaches
onboarding.methodology.explore.subtitle: Select the methodology that best fits your family's philosophy. You can always change this later.
onboarding.roadmap.title: Your personalized roadmap
onboarding.roadmap.subtitle: Here's what we recommend to get started. You can come back to these at any time.
onboarding.roadmap.section.recommendatio: Top recommendations for your family's methodology and grade levels.
legal.terms.title: Terms of Service
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
error.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error.offlineDescription: Check your internet connection and try again.
settings.title: Family Settings
settings.students.name: Display name
settings.students.empty.description: Add student profiles for each child you homeschool.
settings.students.edit.label: Edit {name}
settings.students.delete.label: Delete {name}
settings.students.delete.title: Delete student
settings.students.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
settings.coparents.invite.title: Invite a co-parent
settings.coparents.remove.label: Remove {name}
settings.coparents.remove.title: Remove co-parent
settings.coparents.remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name}? They will lose access to this family.
settings.coparents.transfer.label: Transfer primary to {name}
settings.coparents.transfer.title: Transfer primary parent
settings.coparents.transfer.description: Transfer primary parent role to {name}? You will become a co-parent.
settings.notifications.title: Notification Preferences
settings.notifications.description: Choose how you want to be notified about activity in your family.
settings.subscription.title: Subscription
settings.subscription.description: Choose the plan that works for your family.
settings.account.title: Account Settings
settings.account.sessions.description: View and manage your active login sessions
settings.account.export.description: Download a copy of all your family data
settings.account.delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all data
settings.privacy.title: Privacy Controls
settings.privacy.description: Control who can see your family information in the community.
settings.privacy.field.name: Family name
settings.privacy.field.name.description: Your family display name shown in the community
settings.privacy.field.location.descript: Your state and region visible to other families
settings.privacy.field.methodology.descr: Your homeschooling approach shown on your profile
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty.description: You'll see activity updates, messages, and alerts here.
notifications.bell.label: {count, plural, =0 {Notifications} one {1 unread notification} other {{count} unread notifications}}
notifications.time.minutes: {count, plural, one {1 minute ago} other {{count} minutes ago}}
notifications.time.hours: {count, plural, one {1 hour ago} other {{count} hours ago}}
notifications.time.days: {count, plural, one {1 day ago} other {{count} days ago}}
sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: These are the devices currently logged into your account. You can revoke access to any session you don't recognize.
sessions.revoke.title: Revoke session
sessions.revoke.description: This will immediately log out the selected device. The user will need to sign in again.
sessions.revokeAll.title: Log out all other devices
sessions.revokeAll.description: This will immediately log out all other devices. Only your current session will remain active.
sessions.time.minutes: {count, plural, one {1 minute ago} other {{count} minutes ago}}
sessions.time.hours: {count, plural, one {1 hour ago} other {{count} hours ago}}
sessions.time.days: {count, plural, one {1 day ago} other {{count} days ago}}
dataExport.title: Export Your Data
dataExport.description: Download a copy of your family's data. Exports include learning records, social activity, and settings.
dataExport.new.title: Request a new export
accountDeletion.title: Delete Account
accountDeletion.description: Permanently delete your family account and all associated data. This action has a 30-day grace period.
accountDeletion.consequences.title: What will be deleted
accountDeletion.consequence.data: All learning records, journals, reading lists, and progress data
accountDeletion.consequence.students: All student profiles and their associated data
accountDeletion.consequence.social: All social connections, messages, and group memberships
accountDeletion.consequence.irreversible: After the grace period, this action cannot be undone
accountDeletion.exportOffer.title: Export your data first
accountDeletion.exportOffer.description: Download a copy of all your data before deleting your account.
accountDeletion.confirm.title: Confirm deletion
accountDeletion.confirm.acknowledge: I understand that after the 30-day grace period, all my data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
accountDeletion.confirm.typeFamily.label: Type your family name to confirm deletion
accountDeletion.pending.title: Deletion scheduled
accountDeletion.pending.description: Your account is scheduled for deletion. You have {days} days remaining (until {date}) to cancel. After that, all data will be permanently removed.
studentDeletion.title: Delete {name}
studentDeletion.description: Permanently delete this student profile and all associated data.
studentDeletion.coppa.title: Immediate deletion
studentDeletion.coppa.description: Per COPPA regulations, child data is deleted immediately upon confirmation. There is no grace period.
studentDeletion.consequences.title: What will be deleted
studentDeletion.consequence.learning: All learning records, journals, and progress data
studentDeletion.consequence.immediate: This deletion is immediate and cannot be undone
studentDeletion.confirm.acknowledge: I understand that this student's data will be permanently deleted immediately.
studentDeletion.confirm.typeName.label: Type the student name to confirm deletion
notificationHistory.title: Notification History
notificationHistory.description: {total, plural, =0 {No notifications} one {1 notification} other {{total} notifications}}
notificationHistory.empty.description: You'll see activity updates, messages, and alerts here as they come in.
notificationHistory.empty.filtered.descr: Try adjusting your filters to see more results.
notificationHistory.list.label: Notification history
notificationHistory.pagination.label: Notification pages
parentEducation.title: About {tool}
learning.title: Learning
learning.noStudents.description: Add students in family settings to start tracking their learning.
learning.guidance: Use these tools to track and document your homeschool journey. Each tool adapts to your chosen methodology.
activityLog.title: Activity Log
activityLog.add.title: Log a new activity
activityLog.selectStudentFirst.descripti: Choose a student to view and log their activities.
activityLog.empty.description: Start logging learning activities to build a record of progress.
activityLog.field.title: Activity title
activityLog.field.title.placeholder: e.g. Read Chapter 5 of Charlotte's Web
activityLog.filter.subject: Subject
journals.title: Journals
journals.empty.description: Start writing to capture learning moments, narrations, and reflections.
journalEditor.title: New Journal Entry

reading.newList.title: Create a reading list
reading.lists.empty.description: Create a reading list to organize and track books.
reading.progress.empty.description: Start reading by adding books to a list.
progress.title: {name}'s Progress
quiz.shortAnswer.parentReview: This question will be reviewed by a parent
quiz.scoring.title: Score: {quiz}
quiz.scoring.alreadyScored: This quiz has already been scored
video.unsupported: Your browser does not support video playback
content.title: Content Viewer
content.notFound.description: This content may have been removed or is no longer available.
sequence.skip.title: Skip this item?
sequence.skip.message: Skipping will mark this item as skipped and advance to the next. This action will be logged.
sequence.unlock.title: Unlock this item?
sequence.unlock.message: Unlocking will make this item available ahead of the normal progression. This override will be logged.
grades.title: Tests & Grades
grades.add.title: Record Assessment
grades.filter.subject: Subject
grades.field.title: Assessment title
grades.empty.description: Record your first test, quiz, or assessment to start tracking grades.
student.assignments.empty.description: You don't have any assignments right now. Great job!
sessionLog.title: Session Activity Log
sessionLog.empty.description: Activity during a student session will appear here.
session.launcher.title: Start Student Session
session.noStudents.description: Add a student in Family Settings to start a supervised session.
session.ageGate.title: Verify Student Age
session.ageGate.message: {name} is 10 or older. Please confirm you are the parent or guardian starting this supervised session.
session.confirm.title: Start session for {name}
session.confirm.description: Choose how long this supervised session should last. You can always end it early or extend the time.
session.duration.label: Session duration
session.timeout.title: Session Ending Soon
session.timeout.message: This student session will end in {minutes} minutes.
session.overlay.label: {name}'s Session
